name: Fujifilm Instax Square Film Paper
description: This pack of FUJIFILM INSTAX SQUARE Instant Film of instant color film that is compatible for use with INSTAX SQUARE cameras. This film features vivid color reproduction with natural skin tones, and its refined grain structure provides high image sharpness and clarity.

features.Key Features:: For FUJIFILM INSTAX SQUARE Cameras | White Frame Borders | 2.4 x 2.4" Image Area | 3.4 x 2.8" Print Size | Vibrant Colors and Natural Skin Tones | Excellent Sharpness and Grain Structure
